{{Extension|templatemode = 
|name                 = ImageSlider 
|status               = stable
|type1                = parser function
|type2                = 
|hook1                = ParserFirstCallInit
|hook2                = 
|newhook1             = 
|newhook2             = 
|username             = Kristbaum
|author               = <!-- add only if different from user name -->
|description          = Adds a lightweight before/after image comparison slider
|image                =ImageSliderExtensionDemo.gif 
|version              = 1.0.0
|update               = 2025-09-18
|version preview      = 
|update preview       = 
|compatibility policy = main
|mediawiki            = >= 1.39
|php                  = 
|needs-updatephp      =No 
|composer             = 
|table1               = 
|table2               = 
|license              =  GPL-3.0-or-later
|download             = {{GithubDownload|kristbaum|ImageSlider|mastertarball=1}}
|readme               = [https://github.com/kristbaum/ImageSlider/blob/main/README.md README]
|changelog            = 
|help                 = <!-- automatically links to Help:Extension:ExtName if it exists, otherwise enter full wikitext link to end-user docs -->
|example              = <code>{{#imageslider:Image1=File:Before.jpg|Image2=File:After.jpg|width=800px}}</code>
|namespace            = 
|parameters           = 
|tags                 = 
|rights               = <!-- user rights, for use with $wgGroupPermissions -->
|compatibility        = 
|phabricator          = 
|vagrant-role         = 
}}

The '''ImageSlider''' extension provides a simple, dependency‑light before/after comparison slider for two images using a parser function. 

It supports both vertical (left/right) and horizontal (up/down) reveal modes, is keyboard accessible (ARIA slider, arrow keys, Home/End), touch/mouse friendly, and adds no external libraries.

Based on the [https://www.fuerthwiki.de/wiki/index.php?title=Kategorie:Hat_ImageSlider FürthWiki implementation] by Mark Muzenhardt.

== Usage == 

Basic example: <syntaxhighlight lang="mediawiki"> {{#imageslider:Image1=File:20250528 SL1 Offiziers Speiseanstalt, Postkarte.jpg|Image2=File:20250528 SL2 Offiziers Speiseanstalt Fürth.jpg|width=900px}} </syntaxhighlight>

With horizontal mode: <syntaxhighlight lang="mediawiki"> {{#imageslider:Image1=File:20250528 SL1 Offiziers Speiseanstalt, Postkarte.jpg|Image2=File:20250528 SL2 Offiziers Speiseanstalt Fürth.jpg|width=900px|orientation=horizontal}} </syntaxhighlight>


=== Parameters (parser function) ===

{| class="wikitable"
! Name !! Required !! Description
|-
| Image1 || Yes || First (base) image (initially visible side: left or top)
|-
| Image2 || Yes || Second image revealed by sliding
|-
| width || No || Max container width (e.g. <code>900px</code>, <code>60%</code>, <code>100%</code>). Default: 900px
|-
| orientation || No || <code>vertical</code> (default, divider moves left/right) or <code>horizontal</code> (divider moves up/down)
|}

If either file cannot be resolved, an inline error is shown and the page is added to the tracking category.

==Installation==

{{ExtensionInstall|registration=true|download-link=[https://github.com/kristbaum/ImageSlider/tarball/master Download]}}
== Tracking category ==
Pages with parameter or file errors are added to: {{ll|Category:Pages with ImageSlider errors}} (message key: <code>imageslider-tracking-category</code>).

== Full template ==
This is a template with image links and captions below the slider for convenience:
<syntaxhighlight lang="mediawiki"><includeonly>
{{#imageslider:Image1={{{Image1|}}}|Image2={{{Image2|}}}|width={{{width|}}}|orientation={{{orientation|vertical}}}}}

<div class="imageslider-captions" style="margin-top:0.4em; font-size:90%; line-height:1.4;">
[[:File:{{PAGENAME:{{{Image1|}}}}}|First image]]: {{{Caption1|}}}

[[:File:{{PAGENAME:{{{Image2|}}}}}|Second image]]: {{{Caption2|}}}
</div>
</includeonly><noinclude>
This template wraps the ImageSlider parser function.

Parameters:
* Image1 / Image2 (required): File titles (include the `File:` prefix)
* width (optiona, pixels, default 900px)
* orientation (vertical|horizontal, default vertical)
* Caption1 / Caption2 (optional): Text shown beneath with a link to each file.

Example usage:
<pre>{{ImageSlider
| Image1 = File:20250528 SL1 Offiziers Speiseanstalt, Postkarte.jpg
| Image2 = File:20250528 SL2 Offiziers Speiseanstalt Fürth.jpg
| width = 900px
| orientation = vertical
| Caption1 = Postcard, ca. 1916
| Caption2 = Photo from May 2025
}}</pre>
</noinclude></syntaxhighlight>


[[Category:Multimedia]]
